fields.description: Display order + tiebreaker for the item-linkage chain walk. Seeded 10/20/30.
fields.label: Sequence

fields.description: The Process master. Owns the reusable transform shape (is_item_conversion / value_change_attributes).
fields.label: Process

fields.description: The consumed item. Blank is normalized to the IPD item at read time. Swap: = output item = cloth. Conversion: yarn / grey-yarn / greige-cloth.
fields.label: Input Item

fields.description: The produced item. The LAST step's output item must equal the IPD item.
fields.label: Output Item

fields.description: Output qty per 1 input unit. Knitting = cloth per kg yarn; swaps = 1.
fields.label: Quantity Ratio
